title: Standard Refund Policy
content: Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days after approval. To qualify, items must be returned in original packaging or reported as damaged within 48 hours of delivery.

title: Refund Methods
content: Refunds are issued to the original payment method. If the original method is unavailable, a support ticket must be created for alternative arrangements.

title: Standard Delivery Timelines
content: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping takes 1-2 business days. Delays may occur due to weather or peak seasons.

title: Order Tracking
content: Users can check order status using the 'check_order_status' tool. If an order is marked as 'Delivered' but not received, please report it within 24 hours.

title: Unauthorized Access
content: If you suspect unauthorized access, reset your password immediately and contact support. We will never ask for your password via email.

title: Failed Transactions
content: Failed transactions are typically reversed automatically by your bank within 5 business days. If the amount is still deducted, please provide the transaction reference ID.

title: Escalation Policy
content: If an issue remains unresolved after two attempts or involves high-risk claims (fraud, legal), the case is escalated to a support specialist for priority resolution.
